title: Dayr as Sanqūrīyah Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Dayr as Sanqūrīyah with a Z-Score of +4.77. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Dayr as Sanqūrīyah is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 15.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 17%, and the wind speed is 15.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The heat wave has a significant impact on the city, with a critical level warning issued.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's effects immediately.
